metadata.description: Local marketplace for clawd-canvas. Adds a generative-UI canvas to Claude Code: MCP tools (canvas_plan, canvas_diagram, canvas_diff, canvas_dashboard, canvas_table, canvas_report, canvas_render) push validated json-render specs to a browser tab; edits flow back via UserPromptSubmit hook.

plugins.name: parchment
plugins.description: Generative-UI canvas for Claude Code via MCP + json-render.
